conversion_notes: Added native xUnit regression tests for FDF annotation subtype factory routing and representative property round-trips.
Added native xUnit regression tests for FDF document-core round-trips plus fixture-backed load/save parser smoke coverage.
Added native xUnit regression tests for FDF field hierarchy and page/template model round-trips.

Added 43 deterministic tests for PDShading hierarchy: factory routing for all 7 types, dictionary parsing (Background, BBox, AntiAlias, Coords, Domain, Extend, Matrix, BitsPerFlag/Component/Coordinate, Decode, VerticesPerRow), function wiring and EvalFunction clamping, PDResources.GetShading lookup, and COSName constant values.
Added 24 deterministic fixture tests for PDTrueTypeFont and PDCIDFontType2 parity (issue #50): UPM scaling, CIDToGIDMap, TTF width fallback, ToUnicode cmap fallback, Type0 descendant integration.
Added deterministic issue #51 regression tests for Type0/CIDFontType0 CMap CID resolution, composite ToUnicode fallback integration, Identity-H fallback handling, and descendant factory routing.
Added deterministic XmpBox regression coverage for primitive/simple property creation, array property handling, reflection-driven structured type instantiation, and DateConverter ISO8601 round-trips.

Ported the custom built-in font encoding wrapper that seeds the base lookup tables from an embedded code-to-name map.
Ported the FontBox base encoding map with code/name lookup parity and an unmodifiable code-to-name view via ReadOnlyDictionary.
Mechanical port of MacRomanEncoding using the upstream table data normalized from Java octal literals into C# tuple entries.
Mechanical port of Adobe Standard Encoding using the upstream table data normalized from Java octal literals into C# tuple entries.
Fixed GetWidth(string name) to scale advance width by 1000/unitsPerEm for non-1000-UPM fonts, aligning with upstream Java parity.
Adapted upstream EncodingTest to xUnit and expanded it with BuiltInEncoding fallback/read-only map coverage.
Initial one-to-one conversion for pilot slice 1
Initial one-to-one conversion for pilot slice 1
Added production RandomAccessReadBuffer to support mechanically ported tests and expanded with ArraySegment<byte> constructor for ByteBuffer-limit parity (PDFBOX-5764).
Initial one-to-one conversion for pilot slice 1
Mechanical port of the in-memory read/write buffer implementation, reusing the existing RandomAccessReadBuffer chunk storage model.
Initial one-to-one conversion for pilot slice 1
Expanded mechanical xUnit v3 parity coverage for RandomAccessReadBuffer, including PDFBOX-5111 local deterministic fixture, PDFBOX-5158, PDFBOX-5161, and PDFBOX-5764 scenarios.
Initial mechanical xUnit conversion of upstream RandomAccessReadView tests.
Mechanical xUnit v3 conversion of upstream RandomAccessReadWriteBuffer tests covering close, clear, paging, seek, and EOF scenarios.
Added AES key-length enum used by encryption layer port scaffolding.
Removed replaced PDLineDashPattern/PDSoftMask/PDFormXObject/PDTransparencyGroup stubs after real implementations landed.
New C# helper class mimicking Java GregorianCalendar semantics needed by DateConverter. Wraps field-by-field storage with DateTimeOffset for arithmetic and epoch conversion.
New C# helper class mimicking Java ParsePosition used by DateConverter.
New C# helper class mimicking Java SimpleTimeZone semantics needed by DateConverter.
Added focused xUnit coverage for COS container/value/stream-adjacent behavior and visitor completeness in chunk-1 scope.
Added focused xUnit coverage for COS document/update state propagation and COSIncrement collection of updated direct versus indirect children.
Added fixture-driven COS regression coverage for issue #29: deterministic parse/serialize roundtrips for minimal and mixed fixtures plus malformed fixture assertions for parser stability.

Added visitor traversal and serialization-focused xUnit coverage for issue #28: visitor dispatch across all COS primitive/container types, mixed object graph traversal, COSWriter ICOSVisitor path, and deterministic serialization fixtures.
Added device color-space conversion, factory resolution, PDColor roundtrip, and ICCBased fallback coverage.
Extended content-stream engine tests with form XObject traversal through Do operator.
Issue-47 regression fixture and closeout tests for tagged read path, artifact subtype dispatch, attribute-owner dispatch, and helper types.
Native xUnit regression coverage for the new filetypedetector slice.
Deterministic minimal tagged PDF fixture for end-to-end structure-tree and parent-tree regression coverage.
Added fixture-based full loader tests covering classic xref tables, Flate-compressed content streams, and cross-reference streams with catalog/page/info verification.

note: Expanded operator processor tests to cover state, path, painting, clipping, color, inline-image hooks, type3, compatibility, and multi-operator scenario.

conversion_notes: 16 issue-45 tests covering role-map round-trip, standard-type resolution, PDAttributeObject factory dispatch, PDDefaultAttributeObject, PDUserAttributeObject user-property CRUD, PDStructureElement attribute CRUD and change notification, and PDStructureTreeRoot ClassMap single/list/null variants.

Added fixture-driven load→save→reload roundtrip smoke tests for all four parser-integrated paths (classic xref, flate-content, xref-stream, object-stream). Closes issue #41 regression fixture and roundtrip scope.
Added ExtGState accessor/copy behavior coverage for alpha, blend mode, line join, and dash pattern.
Added fixture and synthetic coverage for parser bootstrap behavior: valid/invalid `%PDF-` header handling and deterministic `startxref` extraction near EOF.
Added xref-stream + object-stream coverage and validated parsed COSDocument/trailer integration for compressed indirect object resolution.
Added classic xref-table coverage for trailer reference resolution, /Prev loop safety, malformed xref subsection/entry rejection, and parsed COSDocument/trailer integration.
Added PDImageXObject simple Flate DeviceRGB decode fixture coverage.

29 issue-46 tests covering parent-tree round-trip, single-element lookup, array-value lookup, missing-key guard, end-to-end catalog→StructTreeRoot→ParentTree→elements traversal, multi-page stability, and all three new attribute subtypes plus factory dispatch.
Added PDStream Flate encode/decode roundtrip coverage.

Added focused parser/writer roundtrip coverage for deterministic token/object parse-serialize-parse behavior on small fixtures and comment/whitespace handling, and adapted upstream COSWriterTest testPDFBox4321 intent to verify writer does not close the caller-provided output stream.
Native .NET test for printing classes (compile + instantiation only; rendering assertions skipped on headless CI).
Native xUnit coverage for PageLayout/PageMode roundtrip, language, and null-clear semantics for new catalog methods.
Native xUnit coverage for PDRectangle constructors, coordinate accessors, contains, retranslation, immutability guard, and standard paper-size constants.
Expanded focused xUnit coverage for schema creation/lookup registration and deterministic schema roundtrip serialization/parsing.
Adapted Loader port for the current .NET PDF pipeline. PDF and FDF byte-array, file-path, and RandomAccessRead entry points are implemented; XFDF and public-key overloads remain deferred.
Added active resource tracking and form XObject content traversal.
Aligned Do operator mapping to current upstream graphics package and retained XObject dispatch semantics in the content stream pipeline.

note: Ported missing color operator processor for stroking/non-stroking color and color-space state.
Ported missing color operator processor for stroking/non-stroking color and color-space state.
Ported missing color operator processor for stroking/non-stroking color and color-space state.

conversion_notes: Expanded COSArray parity with COSUpdateInfo wiring, update-state propagation, and direct-array incremental-save semantics.
Added foundational COS base class with direct/indirect metadata support.
Ported boolean primitive singleton instances and PDF serialization output.
Expanded COSDictionary parity with COSUpdateInfo wiring, child origin propagation, and update tracking needed for incremental-save collection.

Mechanical port of COSDocument. Func<RandomAccessStreamCache> adapted to RandomAccessStreamCache.StreamCacheCreateFunction. COSName constants not yet present in C# COSName use GetPDFName(). VisitFromDocument added to ICOSVisitor as default interface method. Added internal parser bridge access to the canonical object pool for parser/COSDocument integration.
Ported the lightweight document parsing/update gate used to control when COS structures begin accepting incremental-save update tracking.
Ported float primitive including malformed lexical recovery cases from upstream PDFBOX fixes.
Ported increment collection logic for updated direct and indirect COS substructures to support future incremental-save writer behavior.
Mechanical port of COS filtered-stream input wrapper backed by a list of decoded Filter instances; no Java-only stream APIs required adaptation.
Ported integer primitive including PDFBox static cache window and invalid-range sentinels.
Ported COS name object caching, byte-level identity, visitor dispatch, and PDF name serialization escaping.
Ported null primitive singleton and PDF serialization output.
Ported numeric primitive abstraction and parser-side number factory.
Expanded the COSObject port with dereferenced/update-state tracking while still deferring parser-driven lazy dereference to the broader parser chunk.
Ported indirect object identity value type used by COSBase and parser-facing references.
Mechanical port of COS filtered-stream output wrapper; wraps a list of encoding Filter streams around a base OutputStream.
Expanded COSStream parity with decoded input/output paths, filter list resolution, decoded view creation, and stream writer lifecycle semantics aligned with upstream behavior.
Ported COS string text/byte handling, UTF-16 BOM handling, hex parsing, visitor dispatch, and PDF serialization.
Ported the COSUpdateInfo contract; Java default interface helpers are represented as C# extension methods over the shared update-state API.
Ported recursive COS update-state management, including child-origin propagation across dictionaries, arrays, and dereferenced COSObject wrappers.
Mechanical port of COS parser interface; single-method interface for dereference-on-demand with no Java-specific API mappings needed.
Expanded visitor interface from primitive-only coverage to include COS containers, names, strings, object, and stream foundation types.
Updated to full table-driven PDFDocEncoding parity mapping (code-to-unicode and unicode-to-code) from upstream implementation.
Updated unmodifiable dictionary parity to override virtual mutation APIs and enforce read-only behavior across base-typed calls.
Ported ASCII85 decode/encode including z-shorthand and ~> termination.
Ported ASCIIHex decode/encode including odd-nibble EOD handling.
Added CCITTFaxDecode filter placeholder throwing NotSupportedException pending managed CCITT implementation.
Ported Crypt filter with Identity support and explicit unsupported-filter exceptions.
Added DCT filter placeholder throwing NotSupportedException until image-decoder integration lands.
Ported filter registry mapping standard filter names and abbreviations.
Ported FlateDecode with zlib/deflate fallback and predictor post-processing.
Ported identity passthrough filter.
Added JBIG2 filter placeholder throwing NotSupportedException pending managed decoder integration.
Added JPX filter placeholder throwing NotSupportedException pending JPEG2000 decoder integration.
Ported LZW decode/encode with CLEAR/EOD handling and early-change support.
Ported predictor decoding helper used by Flate and LZW.
Ported RunLengthDecode filter including encoder used by roundtrip tests.
Added low-level token/object parser bridge adapted from upstream BaseParser semantics for dictionary/array/name/string/number/null/boolean COS parsing roundtrip scope.
Added object stream parser for /ObjStm payloads, decoding object index/object sections and producing indirect object instances for xref type-2 entries.
Added parser-entry scaffolding for PDF header/version validation and tail-based `startxref` discovery, returning bootstrap state for subsequent xref/trailer parsing slices.

Refactored parser entry to consume PDFDocumentParser bootstrap state and hardened xref-table traversal with shared /Prev loop detection plus strict xref entry state validation. Parser now returns a populated COSDocument and shares the canonical COS object pool with trailer/object-stream resolution.
Initial pdfwriter-layer leaf stream port with position and newline formatting helpers for pretty PDF output generation.
Added minimal low-level writer bridge for deterministic COS object serialization, reusing existing COS serialization and COSStandardOutputStream.

Extended COSWriter to implement ICOSVisitor: added VisitFromXxx methods for all COS types and rerouted Write(COSBase?) through visitor dispatch (value.Accept(this)). VisitFromDocument is a no-op; VisitFromObject dereferences the inner object. Existing static Serialize/WriteString helpers preserved.
Mechanical port of CompressParameters.
Expanded PDDocument with page-level operations (add/get/remove/count/pages), version semantics, and envelope-aware save/load over the existing COS parser/writer bridge.

Updated PDDocument.Load(Stream) to consume parser-produced COSDocument directly (trailer/xref/object graph integration), removed legacy raw-trailer fallback, and tied PDDocument disposal to underlying COSDocument lifetime.
Added MarkInfo get/set accessors to complete documentinterchange catalog integration path.
Expanded PDDocumentCatalog with PageLayout, PageMode, Language getters/setters. High-fanout catalog methods deferred.
Expanded PDDocumentCatalog with AcroForm getters/setters and PDAcroForm integration.
Ported core document info dictionary wrapper subset for metadata inspection/update in the minimal chunk-3 open/inspect/save pipeline.
Expanded PDDocumentInformation with date (CreationDate/ModDate via PDF date string encoding) and trapped field methods. Calendar->DateTimeOffset adaptation documented.
Ported the low-dependency PDPage wrapper subset required for page tree membership and document add/get/remove page pipeline operations.

Expanded PDPage with MediaBox, CropBox, BleedBox, TrimBox, ArtBox, Rotation, StructParents, HasContents. Default constructor now initializes LETTER MediaBox per upstream. ClipToMediaBox helper included.
Expanded PDPage with annotation list read/write support via /Annots and typed PDAnnotation wrappers.
Ported a focused PDPageTree subset (enumeration, count, index lookup, add/remove/get) aligned to chunk-3 open/inspect/save lifecycle requirements.
Expanded PDPageTree with GetInheritableAttribute (cycle-safe attribute inheritance), bad-PDF repair for Page-root-instead-of-Pages. Constructors refactored to use COSName constants.
Added ExtGState and typed XObject lookup helpers for gs/Do processing.
Ported PageLayout enum one-to-one with string-value extension and fromString factory.
Ported PageMode enum one-to-one with string-value extension and fromString factory.
Adapted COSArray-backed collection port using Collection<T> to preserve PD/COS synchronization semantics.
Adapted map wrapper port. Java Map<K,V> synchronization was translated to IDictionary<K,V> while keeping COSDictionary writes in lockstep.
Ported low-dependency COS objectability interface to support foundational COS primitives.
Mechanical marker interface port for destination/action union types.
Mechanical wrapper for COS dictionaries used by higher PD model types.
Mechanical immutable rectangle port extracted to a standalone public class so PDRectangle constants and direct type mapping align with current upstream structure.
Implemented metadata stream wrapper with XMP import/export helpers.
Adapted generic name-tree node port with sorted dictionary and null-safe traversal semantics.
Adapted number-tree node port using Activator-based value construction in place of Java reflection.
Adapted object-stream wrapper port against the current PDStream/COSStream APIs in the .NET port.
Mechanical page label range dictionary wrapper port.
Adapted page label dictionary port with Roman/letter label generation and catalog integration.
Adapted test coverage for page label generation and catalog roundtrip behavior.
Mechanical PDModel common range port.
Ported PDRectangle with standard paper-size constants, coordinate accessors, contains/clip, retranslation, and immutable subclass; BoundingBox constructor and AWT geometry methods deferred.
Implemented filter-aware PDStream wrappers for encode/decode and metadata access.
Mechanical typed dictionary wrapper port.
Mechanical complex file specification port including embedded-file dictionary accessors.
Adapted embedded-file stream port using DateTimeOffset-backed embedded date helpers.
Mechanical abstract file specification factory port.
Mechanical string-backed file specification port.
Adapted abstract PDF function base with factory and range/domain helpers.
Adapted sampled function port using a custom bit reader instead of Java ImageInputStream.
Mechanical exponential interpolation function port.
Mechanical stitching function port.
Mechanical PostScript calculator function port over the new type4 helper stack.
Adapted identity function port with safe null-base handling.
Mechanical Type 4 arithmetic operators port.
Mechanical Type 4 bitwise/logical operators port.
Mechanical Type 4 conditional operators port.
Adapted Type 4 execution context using a list-backed execution stack for Stack API parity.
Mechanical Type 4 instruction-sequence executor port.
Mechanical Type 4 instruction-sequence builder port with invariant-culture numeric parsing.
Mechanical Type 4 operator interface port.
Mechanical Type 4 operator registry port.
Mechanical Type 4 tokenizer/parser port.
Mechanical Type 4 relational operators port.
Adapted Type 4 stack operators port using list rotation helpers for .NET.
Expanded owner dispatch in Create factory to PrintField and export-format attribute subtypes.
Generic attribute dictionary with GetAttributeNames/GetAttributeValue/SetAttribute and PotentiallyNotifyChanged wiring.
MarkInfo dictionary wrapper for tagged-PDF document metadata (Marked/UserProperties/Suspects).
Parent-tree value wrapper for dictionary or MCID-indexed array parent tree entries.

Typed PDNumberTreeNode subclass for the parent tree (ParentTree entry). Overrides ConvertCOSToPD to produce PDStructureElement instances; GetStructureElements handles both single-dict and array-of-dict values stored at each numeric key.
Issue #46: added GetParentTree/SetParentTree/GetParentTreeEntries parent-tree accessors and PDNumberTreeNode.Common using directive.
User-properties attribute object (O=UserProperties) with COSArray-backed PDUserProperty list management.
Single user-property dictionary (N/V/F/H) with back-notification to parent PDUserAttributeObject when any field changes.
Updated Create factory to dispatch Artifact tag to PDArtifactMarkedContent subtype for tagged-PDF parity.
Marked-content property-list dictionary wrapper with create helper.
Prepress box-style dictionary with guideline color/width/style and line-dash accessors.
Artifact marked-content specialization (type, bbox, attached edges, subtype).
Export-format attribute object owners and list-numbering accessors.
Four-edge color wrapper used by tagged-PDF standard attributes.

Layout attribute object (O=Layout) with typed accessors for Placement, WritingMode, TextAlign, Width, Height, SpaceBefore, SpaceAfter, StartIndent, EndIndent, TextIndent, BaselineShift, LineHeight, BlockAlign, InlineAlign, ColumnCount.
List attribute object (O=List) with typed accessor for ListNumbering keyword.
PrintField attribute object with role, checked state, and alternate-name accessors.
Mechanical port; placed in LogicalStructure namespace where subclasses reside.
Table attribute object (O=Table) with typed accessors for RowSpan, ColSpan, Headers, Scope, Summary, Short.
Standard tagged-PDF structure-type constants inventory.
Ported access permission bitfield model and flag mutators for standard/public-key permission bytes.
Added base decryption material abstraction.
Added hash algorithm factory helpers (MD5/SHA1/SHA256).
Added crypt filter dictionary wrapper and EncryptMetadata flag handling.
Ported encryption dictionary accessor model for key entries, permissions, and crypt filter wiring.
Added protection policy key length and AES preference configuration.
Added abstract security handler base state and contract for encryption/decryption preparation.
Added password-holding decryption material type.
Added standard password-based protection policy wrapper.
Added standard security handler shell with constructors and override points; algorithm implementation deferred.

Mechanical port of CIDSystemInfo data class.
Added cross-platform file system font discovery provider with stable ordered enumeration and subset-prefix normalization.
Added font mapper interface.
Added default font provider wrapper with injectable file-system lookup for deterministic tests.
Added lazy global font mapper singleton wiring.
PDCIDFont: Added HasExplicitCidWidth helper and promoted _defaultWidth to protected DefaultWidth for subclass TTF-width fallback.
Issue #51: added CIDSystemInfo accessor for composite Type0 CMap/UCS2 integration paths.
Issue #51: validated CIDFontType0 descendant integration through Type0 encoding CMap-driven CID resolution and width delegation.
Implemented CIDFontType2 wrapper for embedded TrueType fonts with shared CID width default handling.
Adapted stub; PDCIDFontType2 embedding deferred pending PDFontDescriptor setters.
Added CID system info wrapper for Registry/Ordering/Supplement.
Replaced font stubs with concrete PDModel font hierarchy, descendant descriptor fallback, and CID width handling for composite fonts.
Added PDFontDescriptor metric normalization, flag helpers, panose access, and descriptor dictionary accessors.
Added font factory dispatch based on PDF font subtype.
Added PANOSE classification wrapper.
Implemented simple-font width, glyph, and encoding-backed unicode fallback behavior, with constructor support for Type1-specific resolved encodings.
Implemented TrueType font loading and cmap-backed unicode fallback behavior.
Adapted stub; PDTrueTypeFont embedding deferred pending PDFontDescriptor setters.
Implemented composite Type0 font wiring with descendant descriptor and CID width delegation.
Issue #51: wired Type0 /Encoding CMap parsing (stream and predefined identity fallback), CodeToCID via Type0 CMap, and composite ToUnicode fallback chaining to UCS2/preferred descendant mapping.
Implemented Type1 font loading with embedded PFB/segment support, mapped system-font fallback loading, and embedded encoding precedence for unicode/width lookup parity.
Adapted stub; PDType1Font embedding deferred pending PfbParser port.
Added canonical mapping for standard 14 PDF fonts, including upstream alias matrix coverage used by Acrobat/PDF.js compatibility names.
Mechanical port of Subsetter interface; renamed ISubsetter per C# conventions.
Adapted stub; font subsetting deferred pending PDFontDescriptor setters.
Implemented dictionary encoding resolution and Differences overrides, including Standard14 symbolic fallback to Symbol/ZapfDingbats encodings.
Added PDModel encoding base class.
Added MacRoman encoding wrapper for PDModel fonts.
Added Symbol encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Added Type1 built-in encoding adapter from parsed Type1 fonts.
Added WinAnsi encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Added ZapfDingbats encoding map for PDModel fonts.
Replaced dash-pattern stub with immutable COS-backed line dash pattern model.
Added subtype-based XObject factory for form/transparency/image streams.
Mechanical port of abstract base class; AWT imaging methods omitted.
Java java.awt.color.ColorSpace.CS_CIEXYZ replaced with Bradford XYZ->sRGB matrix.
Added calibrated gray color space with gamma-aware grayscale conversion.
Added calibrated RGB color space with gamma handling.
Replaced color stub with immutable PDColor value supporting COS-array roundtrip and packed RGB conversion.
Ported core PDColorSpace abstraction and factory-based COS parsing for standard and array-defined PDF color spaces.
Added PDColorSpaceFactory compatibility wrapper for explicit factory call sites.
Ported DeviceCMYK singleton using managed CMYK-to-RGB fallback conversion.
Mechanical port of abstract base class.
Ported DeviceGray singleton with grayscale-to-RGB conversion.
Added DeviceN color space with alternate-space mapping fallback.
Mechanical port; COSDictionaryMap<String,PDSeparation> expressed as IDictionary.
Mechanical port of dictionary wrapper.
Ported DeviceRGB singleton with initial color/default decode and direct RGB conversion.
Mechanical port of three-float RGB gamma wrapper.
Added ICCBased color space with alternate color space and component-count fallback behavior.
Added Indexed color space with lookup table decode from COSString/COSStream.
java.awt.color.ColorSpace replaced with direct component-count/range parameters.
Added Lab color space with managed Lab-to-sRGB conversion path.
java.awt.color.ICC_Profile replaced with raw stream byte copy.
Added Pattern color space wrapper with optional underlying color space support.
Added Separation color space with alternate-space RGB mapping fallback.
Mechanical port of empty abstract base.
Mechanical port of three-float XYZ tristimulus wrapper.
Implemented form XObject content stream, resources, BBox, and matrix access.
Added transparency-group subtype over PDFormXObject.

Adapted stub; lossless image factory requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
Existing adapted abstract class; traceability record added.
Implemented basic image XObject decode and metadata access for DeviceRGB/Flate test path.
Adapted stub; PNG converter requires platform-specific imaging APIs.
Adapted stub; sampled image reader requires platform-specific imaging APIs.

Mechanical port of Orientation enum.
Adapted port of PDFPageable. Java's java.awt.print.Book/Pageable replaced by PdfPageFormat record and GetPageFormat()/GetPrintable() methods. System.Drawing.Printing not used.

Adapted port of PDFPrintable. Java's java.awt.print.Printable interface replaced by RenderPage() method taking Graphics2D and imageable area dimensions. System.Drawing.Printing not used (Windows-only, not available on .NET 10 Linux).
Mechanical port of Scaling enum.

Adapted port of DateConverter. Java Calendar/GregorianCalendar/TimeZone replaced by custom C# GregorianCalendar and SimpleTimeZone helper classes (see Util/) preserving Java semantics. SimpleDateFormat replaced by DateTime.TryParseExact with both yy/yyyy year variants.
Mechanical port of Hex utility: hex encoding/decoding, base64 decoding, UTF16-BE char conversion.

Mechanical port of iterative (bottom-up) merge sort. Java List<T>/Comparator adapted to IList<T>/IComparer<T>. System.arraycopy replaced with Array.Copy. Suppressed Java raw-type warnings have no equivalent in C#.
Mechanical port of NumberFormatUtil: fast float-to-ASCII formatting.
Mechanical port of StringUtil: SplitOnSpace and TokenizeOnSpace using .NET Regex.
Initial pdfbox utility port for a low-fanout leaf type to seed the broader pdfbox conversion backlog.

Adapted port of PDFBox version reader. Java reads version.properties via classloader; .NET adaptation uses AssemblyInformationalVersionAttribute and falls back to Assembly.GetName().Version. Fallback null-on-error semantics are preserved.

Mechanical port of XML utility. Java DocumentBuilderFactory hardening (disallow-doctype-decl, external-general/parameter-entities, load-external-dtd, XInclude-aware=false) mapped to XmlReaderSettings with DtdProcessing.Prohibit and XmlResolver=null. Document returned as XmlDocument instead of org.w3c.dom.Document. GetNodeValue adapted to iterate XmlNode children and collect XmlText values.
Mechanical trie helper port for byte-signature lookup used by FileTypeDetector.
Mechanical enum port for supported file-signature types.
Adapted file-signature detector port. Java mark/reset requirements were translated to seekable Stream handling while preserving byte-array detection semantics.
Mechanical xUnit conversion of upstream COSDictionaryTest covering dictionary-vs-stream inequality behavior.
Converted upstream COSObjectKey unit tests for validation, ordering, equality, and hashing semantics.
Converted upstream PDFDocEncoding test coverage for documented encoding deviations and PDFBOX-3864 roundtrip behavior.
Mechanical xUnit conversion of upstream TestCOSArray for COSArray container behavior parity.
Adapted xUnit conversion of upstream TestCOSName focused on COSName key encoding/escaping scenarios available in this layer.
Expanded xUnit conversion of upstream TestCOSStream to include single/multi-filter encode/decode parity and double-close behavior for filtered streams.
Adapted xUnit conversion of upstream TestCOSString covering hex/literal forms, parsing, equality/hash, BOM, and unicode handling in this layer.
Converted upstream unmodifiable dictionary mutation-guard tests with DateTimeOffset-based date adaptation.
Added .NET-focused filter roundtrip coverage and FilterFactory COSName lookup tests.
Adapted save/load stream and save/load file testing intent from TestPDDocument into deterministic chunk-3 smoke coverage, adding version and page-count assertions for expanded PDDocument behavior.
Adapted PDDocumentInformation tests covering string fields, date roundtrip, trapped validation, custom metadata.
Adapted PDPage tests covering box accessors, rotation normalization, structParents, hasContents.
Adapted TestPDPageTree intent to deterministic blank-page scenarios validating indexOf/count and remove operations in the current dependency slice.
Mechanical test helper port for integer-backed name-tree nodes.
Mechanical xUnit v3 conversion of upstream name-tree tests plus value lookup coverage.
Mechanical xUnit v3 conversion of upstream number-tree tests.
Adapted function test coverage combining upstream Type 4 scenarios, parser cases, and Type 2 evaluation checks.
Mechanical xUnit helper port for Type 4 operator/parser tests.
Added .NET encryption baseline tests for AccessPermission, PDEncryption, and StandardSecurityHandler instantiation.
Adapted port of DateConverter tests. Calendar API replaced with PdfGregorianCalendar alias. TimeZone.setDefault() removed; tests use UTC by default. Timezone name tests adapted for .NET TimeZoneInfo.
Mechanical port of Hex tests.
Expanded font replacement tests for width arrays, ToUnicode CMap decoding, descriptor metrics, and Standard14 mapping.
Ported PDFBox date parsing/ISO8601 formatting utilities for DateTimeOffset-based XmpBox type support.
Adapted metadata port to add schema registration, typed schema create/get APIs, namespace-aware schema parsing, and RDF synthesis for schema-backed serialization.
Mechanical xmpbox constants port for RDF/xpacket defaults and core attribute names.
Adapted Adobe PDF schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted Dublin Core schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted Exif schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted PDF/A extension schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.

Adapted Photoshop schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted TIFF schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted XMP basic job ticket schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted XMP basic schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.

Adapted XMP page text schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted XMP rights management schema class shell with preferred namespace/prefix constructors for typed registration parity.
Adapted base schema abstraction for namespace/prefix identity, rdf:about handling, and description-element persistence used by parser/serializer registration flows.
Adapted schema factory for namespace-to-schema instantiation with optional prefix override and metadata registration wiring.
Mechanical schema exception port with message/cause constructor parity.
Ported the abstract complex-property base with container and namespace-prefix registry support.
Ported the abstract XMP field base with metadata/property-name/attribute support.
Ported the abstract simple-property base with namespace, prefix, raw-value, and string/value APIs.
Ported the abstract structured-type base with reflection-driven property helpers and namespace metadata.
Mechanical port of AgentNameType from Apache PDFBox xmpbox type model.
Ported the XMP array property model for Bag/Seq/Alt content handling.
Ported the XML attribute POJO from Attribute.java under the C#-safe XmpAttribute name.
Ported the XmpBox bad field value exception used by type instantiation and parsing.
Mechanical port of BooleanType from Apache PDFBox xmpbox type model.
Mechanical port of CFAPatternType from Apache PDFBox xmpbox type model.
Ported cardinality model with C# enum/extension adaptation for simple and array property handling.
Mechanical port of ChoiceType from Apache PDFBox xmpbox type model.

Ported the complex property container for child property lookup, comparison, and removal.

Ported the central XmpBox type mapping registry, reflection scanners, and property/structured factory helpers.

Adapted secure DOM parser entry-point with strict/lenient xpacket handling and RDF root extraction.
Adapted PDF/A extension helper port for namespace validation and schema/type/property mapping population from RDF extension declarations.
